column3: Description
Total number of nodes in the SC network
Total number of links in the SC network
Type of supply chain (Forward, Reverse, Closed-loop)

column2: Supply Chain Network Graph Performance Measures

column3: Description
The overall cost of the supply chain in a given time period/time unit (month/quarter/half year/year)
Average supply chain cost per time unit (daily/monthly/quarterly)
Net revenue generated by the supply chain in a given time period
Average net revenue generated by the SC per time unit
Percentage of demand met on time in a given time period
Overall resilience of the network under disruption, based on node and edge reliability
Average cost incurred per unit of product (ratio of total cost to received demand)
Average cost of an order
Total cost of storing each product item at nodes in the network
Total expenses for replenishing the inventory at nodes
Total transportation cost (sum) across nodes in the network
Total income generated by all nodes in the network
Supply availability rate (percentage of demand nodes that have access to supplies)
Size of the largest functional subnetwork (where there is a path between any two nodes and at least one supplier exists)
Based on average supplier-to-consumer path length
Total number of forward, reverse, and within-tier material flows
Average number of nodes per geographic cluster
Variance in node density across clusters
Percentage of nodes that act as suppliers in the supply chain network
Percentage of critical nodes (nodes that could cut the main flow when down)
